title: equisetum arvense f. proliferum
intro: Equisetum arvense f. proliferum, also known as field horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is characterized by its distinctive, hollow stems and whorled leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its rich content of silica, which contributes to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum arvense f. proliferum include its ability to support kidney and urinary tract health, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Equisetum arvense f. proliferum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in supplement form, allowing for convenient access to its medicinal properties.
